'''natanga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jab|jab]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-t-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jab|jab]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| natanga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nætængæth|nætængæth]] || [[word:nætængæj|nætængæj]] || [[word:nætængæsh|nætængæsh]] || [[word:nætængæ|nætængæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:natatangath|natatangath]] || [[word:natatangaj|natatangaj]] || [[word:natatangash|natatangash]] || [[word:natatanga|natatanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:natangath|natangath]] || [[word:natangaj|natangaj]] || [[word:natangash|natangash]] || [[word:natanga|natanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:natafngath|natafngath]] || [[word:natafngaj|natafngaj]] || [[word:natafngash|natafngash]] || [[word:natafngaf|natafngaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:natangatha|natangatha]] || [[word:natangaja|natangaja]] || [[word:natangasha|natangasha]] || [[word:natangaka|natangaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:natangath|natangath]] || [[word:natangaj|natangaj]] || [[word:natangash|natangash]] || [[word:natanga|natanga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:natangathal|natangathal]] || [[word:natangajal|natangajal]] || [[word:natangashal|natangashal]] || [[word:natangakal|natangakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:natangathatha|natangathatha]] || [[word:natangajaja|natangajaja]] || [[word:natangashasha|natangashasha]] || [[word:natangaka|natangaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:natangathan|natangathan]] || [[word:natangajan|natangajan]] || [[word:natangashan|natangashan]] || [[word:natangakan|natangakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:natangathaoro|natangathaoro]] || [[word:natangajaoro|natangajaoro]] || [[word:natangashaoro|natangashaoro]] || [[word:natangakaoro|natangakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
